name: @unship/cli
description: Tiny local DOM picker for temporary agent-authored UI variants.
author: Marcus Benhard

scripts.check: node --check src/agent/index.js && node --check src/check/index.js && node --check src/cli/index.js && node --check src/install/index.js && node --check src/setup/index.js && node --check src/picker/unship-picker.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run e2e && npm pack --dry-run
